narrative:
Riverside City has 14,597 registered voters, with 64.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.2%, a modest Republican lean of 3.5 percentage points.
